TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Tjuaqau ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Taznin go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 67 buwan, 185 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 178 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 7 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 95%, Amis 1%, Bunun 1%, Puyuma 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Tjuaqau hya' ga Larepaq. tay 'zil na Tjuaqau hya' ga Tjuavanaq. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Tjuaqau ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Tjuaqau ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ tjuaqau ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu taznin ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pajwan **%, amis~ɕ *%, βunun *%, pujuma *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na tjuaqau ħjaʔ ɣa larepaq. taj ʔzil na tjuaqau ħjaʔ ɣa tjua*anaq. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ tjuaqau ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ tjuaqau ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Tjuaqau ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Taznin go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 67 buwan, 185 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 178 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 7 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 95%, Amis 1%, Bunun 1%, Puyuma 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Tjuaqau hya' ga Larepaq. tay 'zil na Tjuaqau hya' ga Tjuavanaq. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Tjuaqau ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Tjuaqau ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ tjuaqau ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu taznin ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pajwan **%, amis~ɕ *%, βunun *%, pujuma *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na tjuaqau ħjaʔ ɣa larepaq. taj ʔzil na tjuaqau ħjaʔ ɣa tjua*anaq. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ tjuaqau ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ tjuaqau ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
